dynasimR 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting started with dynasimR
    • Patient flow analysis
    • Doctrine effects: MUF vs. Military Necessity
    • Autonomy-level trade-off (AL0-AL5)
    • Manuscript export workflow
  • Changelog

Package index

Data I/O

Load, validate and inspect simulation outputs.

read_simulation()
Load simulation outputs into the dynasimR standard format
load_example_data()
Load the package-bundled example dataset
validate_dynasimR_data()
Validate a dynasimR_data object
scenario_meta
Scenario metadata for MEDTACS-SIM and REHASIM
survival_params
Weibull survival parameters by triage category

Survival analysis

Kaplan-Meier, Cox regression and associated plots.

km_estimate()
Kaplan-Meier estimator for simulation data
cox_model()
Cox proportional-hazards model for simulation data
plot_km()
Kaplan-Meier survival curves
plot_forest()
Forest plot of Cox hazard ratios

Doctrine effects

MUF vs. Military Necessity quantification.

doctrine_effect()
Quantify doctrine effect (MUF vs. Military Necessity)
plot_doctrine()
Doctrine effect bar chart with CI whiskers

Autonomy trade-off

AL0-AL5 survival-vs-IHL analysis.

al_efficiency()
Compute AL-Efficiency ratio (survival advantage vs. IHL compliance)
plot_al_tradeoff()
Autonomy-level trade-off plot: KIA reduction vs. IHL compliance
plot_radar()
Radar chart of metrics across scenarios

IHL / Patient flow

Compliance index, throughput, bottlenecks.

compute_ihl_index()
IHL-Compliance Index
role_throughput()
Role-1 to Role-4 throughput analysis
detect_bottlenecks()
Bottleneck detection across roles of care
uav_comparison()
Compare outcomes across UAV configurations

Sensitivity analysis

morris_screening()
Morris-style sensitivity screening from simulation replicates
tornado_data()
Tornado-diagram data from one-at-a-time perturbation

REHASIM extensions

Rehabilitation flow analysis.

fim_trajectory_analysis()
FIM trajectory analysis (REHASIM)
compute_waiting_gap_index()
Waiting-Gap Index (REHASIM)
mil_civil_effect()
Military vs. civilian prioritisation effect (REHASIM)
compute_rtd_analysis()
Return-to-Duty outcome analysis (multinomial)
spatial_supply_demand()
Supply-Demand Index (SDI) per region (REHASIM)
plot_fim_curves()
FIM trajectory plot (REHASIM)
plot_sdi_map()
Supply-Demand Index choropleth (REHASIM)
plot_cost_effectiveness()
Cost-effectiveness plane and CEAC curve (REHASIM)

Visualisation

plot_map()
2D casualty map snapshot
plot_scenario_heatmap()
Scenario comparison heatmap
plot_timeline()
Time-series plot of a simulation metric
theme_dynasimR()
ggplot2 theme for dynasimR figures
dynasimR_colors()
NATO-inspired colour palette for dynasimR plots
scale_color_identity_dynasimR()
Colour scale for combatant identity
scale_fill_identity_dynasimR()
Fill scale for combatant identity
scale_color_doctrine_dynasimR()
Colour scale for doctrine principle

Manuscript export

export_figure()
Export a ggplot in publication-ready format
export_latex_table()
Export a tibble as a Springer Nature compatible LaTeX table
fill_placeholders()
Fill [XX_*] placeholders in a LaTeX manuscript

Shiny dashboard

launch_app()
Launch the MEDTACS-SIM Shiny dashboard
check_app_dependencies()
Check availability of Shiny-app dependencies

On this page

Developed by Raban A. Heller.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
